study_title: Dual RNA sequencing of symbiotic and aposymbiotic Cardiocondyla obscurior ants
exp_title: Dual RNA-seq reads from Cardiocondyla obscurior ants
design: RNA was extracted from different life stages and castes (pooled separately) and sequenced using dual RNA sequencing to capture the symbiont where present
